Online Employment Application

  • Home
  • Online Employment Application

Please complete the Windom Area Health Application for Employment below.

Employment Application

Windom Area Health is an Equal Employment Opportunity employer and all hiring decisions will occur without regard to race, color, creed, religion, national origin, sex, marital status, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, veterans’ status, or status in regard to public assistance.

(Please fill out all sections)
